calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Court Judgment Following Entry Of Default
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Wendy L. Hillger, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Gabriel Richman.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Megan Stone.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Gabriel Richman sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,202.73
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,027.14
Attorney's Fees: $7,464.50
Costs: $641.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,336.32
Judgment signed in open court.
